'''鈭歝h-ch-r-l''' ('''kachachreloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wade|wade]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ch-r-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wade|wade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-ch-r-l
|-
! Lemma
| kachachreloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichachreloko|thichachreloko]] || [[word:jichachreloko|jichachreloko]] || [[word:shichachreloko|shichachreloko]] || [[word:kichachreloko|kichachreloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchachreloko|thuthuchachreloko]] || [[word:jujuchachreloko|jujuchachreloko]] || [[word:shushuchachreloko|shushuchachreloko]] || [[word:kukuchachreloko|kukuchachreloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochachreloko|thothochachreloko]] || [[word:jojochachreloko|jojochachreloko]] || [[word:shoshochachreloko|shoshochachreloko]] || [[word:kokochachreloko|kokochachreloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochachreloko|thochachreloko]] || [[word:jochachreloko|jochachreloko]] || [[word:shochachreloko|shochachreloko]] || [[word:kochachreloko|kochachreloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochachreloko|thochachreloko]] || [[word:jochachreloko|jochachreloko]] || [[word:shochachreloko|shochachreloko]] || [[word:kochachreloko|kochachreloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chachreloko|th忙chachreloko]] || [[word:j忙chachreloko|j忙chachreloko]] || [[word:sh忙chachreloko|sh忙chachreloko]] || [[word:k忙chachreloko|k忙chachreloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachachreloko|thathachachreloko]] || [[word:jajachachreloko|jajachachreloko]] || [[word:shashachachreloko|shashachachreloko]] || [[word:kakachachreloko|kakachachreloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachachreloko|thachachreloko]] || [[word:jachachreloko|jachachreloko]] || [[word:shachachreloko|shachachreloko]] || [[word:kachachreloko|kachachreloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachachreloko|thachachreloko]] || [[word:jachachreloko|jachachreloko]] || [[word:shachachreloko|shachachreloko]] || [[word:kachachreloko|kachachreloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
